name: Supertokens With Postgresql
tagline: An open-source authentication solution that simplifies the implementation of secure user authentication and session management for web and mobile applications
description:
An open-source authentication solution that simplifies the implementation of secure user authentication and session management for web and mobile applications

Docs: https://supertokens.com/docs/guides?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  supertokens:
    image: registry.supertokens.io/supertokens/supertokens-postgresql:latest
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      - API_KEYS=${API_KEYS:-}
      - POSTGRESQL_CONNECTION_URI="postgresql://uf63a4fa944:2ed0a9f9de6a7ab188975b3ae634a142@postgres:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-supertokens}"
    healthcheck:
      test: |
        bash -c 'exec 3<>/dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/3567 && echo -e "GET /hello HTTP/1.1\r\nhost: 127.0.0.1:3567\r\nConnection: close\r\n\r\n" >&3 && cat <&3 | grep "Hello"'
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42120:3567
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=uf63a4fa944
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=2ed0a9f9de6a7ab188975b3ae634a142
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRES_DB:-supertokens}
    volumes:
      - supertokens-postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - pg_isready
        - -U
        - uf63a4fa944
        - -d
        - ${POSTGRES_DB:-supertokens}
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  supertokens-postgres-data: null
